allow:
Bash(git commit -m "Fix DeployController working directory - all artisan commands now run from Laravel root

**Issue:** All php artisan commands were failing with ""Could not open input file: artisan""

**Root Cause:** Process::run() was executing commands from the web server''s document root, not the Laravel application root.

**Fix:** Added Process::path(base_path()) to all commands to ensure they run from the correct directory.

**Changes:**
- Set $laravelRoot = base_path() at start of deployment
- All Process::run() calls now use Process::path($laravelRoot)->run()
- Added working directory output for debugging
- Git pull, composer, migrations, storage:link, cache clearing, and optimize all now work correctly

**Commands Fixed:**
- git pull origin master
- composer install
- php artisan migrate --force
- php artisan storage:link
- php artisan config:clear
- php artisan cache:clear
- php artisan view:clear
- php artisan route:clear
- php artisan optimize

This should resolve the 404 download errors by ensuring the storage symlink is created correctly during deployment.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")
